column2: # tidy unnecessary columns, rename for clarity

DNA_dilutions_first24 = select(concs, !c(qubit_run_id, dilution_factor, ul_original_consumed, proportion_original, ng_per_ul))  # remove columns which were only relevant as metadata for qubit measurements
DNA_dilutions_first24 = rename(DNA_dilutions_first24, original_ng_per_ul = extrapolated_original_ng_per_ul) # rename concentration of original extract for clarity
DNA_dilutions_first24 = DNA_dilutions_first24[order(DNA_dilutions_first24$extraction_id),] # reorder dataframe by extraction id
